name: MRI Software
description: MRI Software is a real estate technology platform serving over 45,000 clients across 170+ countries. It provides REST APIs and an open integration ecosystem for property management, investment management, lease accounting, facilities management, visitor and contractor management, and commercial real estate analytics.

itemListElement.name: MRI Information Exchange (MIX) API
itemListElement.description: An open and connected ecosystem of secure REST APIs enabling controlled data exchange between MRI's core property management platform and third-party or custom applications. Over 1,000 unique APIs operate within the MIX environment.

itemListElement.name: MRI OnLocation REST API
itemListElement.description: A REST API for integrating with MRI OnLocation's people presence management platform, enabling programmatic access to visitor, contractor, and employee sign-in data.

itemListElement.name: MRI Property Management X API
itemListElement.description: REST APIs providing programmatic access to MRI's core property management platform, covering residential and commercial property portfolios, units, leases, resident ledgers, maintenance work orders, and AP workflows.
